test.create_query: CREATE TABLE vector_search_pdx_source ( id UInt64, category UInt16, vec Array(Float32) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE vector_search_pdx_hnsw ( id UInt64, category UInt16, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('hnsw', 'cosineDistance', {dims}) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE vector_search_pdx_pdx ( id UInt64, category UInt16, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('pdx', 'cosineDistance', {dims}) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO vector_search_pdx_source SELECT number AS id, toUInt16(number % 10) AS category, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((cityHash64(number, i) % 1000000) / 1000000.), range(toUInt64({dims}))) AS vec FROM numbers({rows})
INSERT INTO vector_search_pdx_hnsw SELECT * FROM vector_search_pdx_source
INSERT INTO vector_search_pdx_pdx SELECT * FROM vector_search_pdx_source
test.query: WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((cityHash64(toUInt64(1001), i) % 1000000) / 1000000.), range(toUInt64({dims}))) AS ref1, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((cityHash64(toUInt64(1002), i) % 1000000) / 1000000.), range(toUInt64({dims}))) AS ref2, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((cityHash64(toUInt64(1003), i) % 1000000) / 1000000.), range(toUInt64({dims}))) AS ref3, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((cityHash64(toUInt64(1004), i) % 1000000) / 1000000.), range(toUInt64({dims}))) AS ref4 SELECT sum(id) FROM ( SELECT id FROM vector_search_pdx_source ORDER BY cosineDistance(vec, ref1) ASC LIMIT {k} UNION ALL SELECT id FROM vector_search_pdx_source ORDER BY cosineDistance(vec, ref2) ASC LIMIT {k} UNION ALL SELECT id FROM vector_search_pdx_source ORDER BY cosineDistance(vec, ref3) ASC LIMIT {k} UNION ALL SELECT id FROM vector_search_pdx_source ORDER BY cosineDistance(vec, ref4) ASC LIMIT {k} ) FORMAT Null
